message:
chore: bump version to 0.1.39 for release

Includes fixes since 0.1.38:
- fix(storage): replace delete+insert metadata pattern with idempotent upsert
- fix(sync): resolve relative temp paths before containment check (#238)
- fix(storage): add VACUUM defense against free space corruption (#237)
- fix(id): resolve child-suffix-aware hash matching for dotted bead IDs
- fix(config): use append-based WAL path convention for sidecar cleanup
- fix(cli,storage): resolve --no-db update "Issue not found" and WAL sidecar corruption (#229, #228)
- fix(storage): avoid fsqlite root-page collision in JSON list queries

Upstream frankensqlite fixes (via path patches):
- fix(vacuum): emit PRIMARY KEY before UNIQUE and skip explicit indexes (#239)
- fix(vacuum): use original DDL SQL instead of reconstructing it
- fix(vacuum): evaluate WHERE clause for partial indexes during persist
- fix(btree): freeblock ordering and coalescing in deferred table leaf delete
- fix(pager): WAL checkpoint mode downgrade fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "beads_rust"
-version = "0.1.38"
+version = "0.1.39"
 edition = "2024"
 rust-version = "1.88"
 description = "Agent-first issue tracker (SQLite + JSONL)"
